title: KamenRiderBossYOUandME
description: Henshin! Step into this heated conflict. In “The Final Boss, You and Me”, it's like the fateful duel of Kamen Riders. The shining belt is the symbol of glory. Amid the intertwining of light and shadow, only the strongest can break through the darkness
body:
This Mod is mainly around monster mechanics, it can not only change rider, become a villain rider, this MOD will continue to update!
  At present, the updated content is only related to monsters. The content regarding riders will be updated in future versions.
  In giifustamp's recent update, for example, the player holds down shift and right presses a villager in mca to turn him into a monster, (The villagers must be the ones from "MCA"！)and if you want him to turn back into a villager, all you have to do is attack the monster again with this item to turn him back into a human.

(The following content will be gradually updated in the future.)

  The unique gameplay it provides, whether it is transforming into a villain rider or manipulating villagers and monsters, will inject new inspiration into every aspect of the game, such as architecture, adventure, battle, and so on, and inspire players to use their imagination to shape a unique game story.
  
  To play this MOD,
Please use geckolib ,Patchouil, minecraft -- comes alive - reborn, playerAnimator, these Mod as front.
It has a prepositional relationship with "kamenriderweaponcraft".
## Disclaimer / 免责声明：
This is a non-commercial, fan-made project created purely out of love for the Kamen Rider series. The developers do not profit from this mod in any way.
Kamen Rider and all related characters, designs, and concepts are trademarks and copyrights of Toei Company, Ltd. and Ishimori Productions. This mod is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with Toei Company or Ishimori Productions.
This mod uses entities from "Minecraft Comes Alive - Reborn" (MCA) for certain transformation mechanics. MCA is a separate project and is not affiliated with this mod.
As this mod is still in active development, features mentioned (such as Rider transformation mechanics) are subject to change in future updates.
